backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all data types (Journey, LocationInfo, CityAlbum, TravelSpot, MusicAlbum, etc.) and stable state maps for a travel/map application, integrating blob storage, access control, and registry modules.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing two confirmed fixes for the Travelogue panel's 2D Leaflet map: correct first-render initialization via invalidateSize, and per-journey marker display when multiple journeys share the same city.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, covering components, hooks, pages, and styles for the Country Map Explorer application.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML entry point for the React app, loading the SunCalc CDN script and mounting the app into a div with id 'root'.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps the app in ThemeProvider, InternetIdentityProvider, and QueryClientProvider, rendering LocationMapExplorer alongside BackendDebugger and a toast notifier.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin panel component providing collapsible UI sections for managing journeys, per-journey schedules (keyed by journey title), travel spots, music albums, and geographical/timezone data.
Invisible utility component that exposes the backend actor as window.backend and logs debugging instructions (role checks, admin promotion) to the browser console on mount.
frontend/src/components/CityAlbumManager: Component for managing per-city media albums, supporting image/video file uploads with validation, real-time social media URL validation, and add/remove operations for both media files and social media links.
frontend/src/components/CityloguePanel.t: Empty file with no content; likely a placeholder or stub for a future Citylogue panel component.
frontend/src/components/GeonameGeographi: A React component for managing geographical city data sourced from Geonames, supporting paginated browsing, search, CSV file import, and CRUD operations (add, edit, delete) via custom query hooks.
frontend/src/components/HeartRating.tsx: A reusable heart-based rating component that renders 10 hearts with support for partial fills, hover effects, click-to-rate with decimal precision, and optional read-only display.
frontend/src/components/InteractiveGlobe: A Three.js-powered 3D interactive globe component featuring city markers, country borders/labels, timezone overlays, solar terminator/twilight rendering, and flight path animations.
frontend/src/components/itinerary/Doodle: A scrapbook-styled itinerary dialog component that renders a journey's schedule grouped by day using a hand-drawn doodle aesthetic with Comic Sans typography and amber color theming.
frontend/src/components/itinerary/RetroI: A React component that renders a vintage postcard-styled itinerary dialog for a given journey, displaying date ranges, schedule items, and activities fetched via `useGetJourneyScheduleWithDays`.
frontend/src/components/LocationInfoDial: A dialog component for adding, editing, or deleting a photo associated with a map location, handling file selection, upload to blob storage, and persistence via mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/LoginPanel.tsx: An authentication panel dialog that handles Internet Identity login/logout, displays the current auth status and truncated principal ID, and clears the React Query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/MapComponent.tsx: A Leaflet-based interactive map component that renders travel spots, schedule items, and bookmarks as custom-icon markers, with popups showing ratings, media galleries, and social links.
frontend/src/components/MediaGalleryPopu: A tabbed media gallery popup component that displays photos, videos, and embedded social media links (YouTube/Instagram) with carousel navigation and fullscreen support.
frontend/src/components/MusicAlbumManage: An admin component for managing music albums and songs, supporting CRUD operations on albums and file uploads for songs via dialogs and forms.
frontend/src/components/MusicPanel.tsx: A dialog-based music panel that lists all music albums and songs, allowing users to select a song for playback, with an empty state for unauthenticated or no-album scenarios.
frontend/src/components/MusicPlayerBar.t: A persistent music player bar component with play/pause, skip, volume, and progress controls that streams songs from blob storage and supports external song selection.
frontend/src/components/TimezoneManageme: An admin component for uploading and persisting timezone GeoJSON data to the backend canister, with IndexedDB caching and a manual multi-step verification workflow.
A collapsible panel component that displays journeys grouped by live/upcoming/past status, with expandable schedule details, flight animation triggers, 2D map integration, and itinerary dialog views in doodle or retro styles.
frontend/src/components/TravelSpotManage: A React component for managing travel spots with full CRUD operations, supporting media file uploads, social media link attachments, city filtering, and heart ratings via a dialog-based form UI.
frontend/src/components/VibesPanel.tsx: A panel component that aggregates and displays travel spots and map bookmarks grouped by city and spot type, with type-specific icons and colors, and focus callbacks for map interaction.
frontend/src/components/WebsiteLayoutPan: A settings panel dialog for managing website layout preferences such as toggling the music player, setting a default search location, and displaying local time with UTC offset.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` and `useInternetIdentity` hook for managing Internet Identity authentication via `AuthClient`, exposing login, logout, and identity state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks and mutations for the app's backend data (journeys, locations, music, schedules, etc.), and includes utilities for geocoding, country name normalization, and social media URL validation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind directives, CSS custom properties for light/dark theme tokens (colors, sidebar, music player), and utility overrides for heading colors and layout.
frontend/src/lib/solarCalculations.ts: Provides a function to calculate solar declination angle for a given day of the year using the standard cosine formula, plus test cases validating results at equinoxes and solstices.
frontend/src/lib/timezoneOffsetUtils.ts: Exports a utility function that filters timezone GeoJSON features to return all timezone IDs matching a given UTC offset (with quarter-hour precision) using the Intl API.
frontend/src/lib/timezoneUtils.ts: Loads and caches timezone boundary GeoJSON data, prioritizing IndexedDB storage and falling back to a backend fetch, with helpers for reading/writing to IndexedDB.
frontend/src/lib/TzOverlayV2.ts: Provides utilities for rendering timezone boundary overlays on a 3D globe using Three.js, including coordinate conversion, longitude unwrapping, timezone offset lookup with DST awareness, and overlay group management.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with React Query and Internet Identity authentication providers.
frontend/src/pages/LocationMapExplorer.t: Main map explorer page component that combines a 2D/3D map view with search, travel travelogue, vibes, music, and admin panels, managing location search, timezone offsets, and flight animations.
frontend/src/utils/scheduleDayStyling.ts: Provides color palette and helper functions for assigning day labels (D1, D2, …), colors, and formatted date strings to schedule items based on their chronological day index.
frontend/src/utils/scheduleRouteUtils.ts: Groups and sorts schedule items by calendar day and time, then builds per-day route coordinate arrays for rendering map routes.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both regular and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to remove parameters from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens (primary, secondary, sidebar, chart, etc.), border radius, accordion keyframes, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for a Travel Travelogue app at version 1144, tracking two active bug fixes: a 2D Leaflet map failing to render on first click without a hard refresh, and map markers from subsequent journeys sharing a city being incorrectly discarded.
